name: Douglas Bettinger
background: Mr. Bettinger has been our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since March 2013. Prior to joining Lam, he served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Avago Technologies Limited from 2008 to 2013.
